title: GM University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: GM University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Gangadhar Meher University Result 2026 declared for MCA Sem II Aug 2025, UG BBA/Arts/Science/Commerce/IST Sem IV Aug 2025, MBA and MBA FM Sem II Aug 2025, PG Sem II Aug 2025, BA BEd and BEd Sem IV on the official website - gmuniversity.ac.in on 25-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the GM University result.

content.text: Gangadhar Meher University has released the GM University Result 2026 for various UG and PG programmes for the August 2025 examination session. The latest results include MCA Sem II, MBA Sem II, MBA Financial Management (MBA FM) Sem II, UG BBA/Arts/Science/Commerce/IST Sem IV, PG Sem II, BA BEd Sem IV and BEd Sem IV examinations. GM University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - gmuniversity.ac.in.

Students can check and download their marksheets by visiting the official notice/result portal, opening the relevant result notification and entering their roll number or other required details on the result page if prompted. After checking the provisional online marks, candidates are advised to verify their personal details, subject-wise scores and result status carefully and contact the university examination cell in case of any discrepancy or error in the result.

GM University has issued a consolidated update of August 2025 semester exam results for multiple UG and PG streams. This covers UG 4th semester students from Arts, Science, Commerce, IST and BBA, along with PG 2nd semester, MCA 2nd semester, MBA and MBA FM 2nd semester, and integrated/teacher education programmes like BA BEd and BEd 4th semester. All these results are available online, enabling students to track their academic progress for the 2025-26 session.

Gangadhar Meher University publishes all latest exam results and related notices on its official Notice/Result page. From there, students can open the respective result PDF or result link for MCA Sem II, MBA/MBA FM Sem II, UG Sem IV (Arts, Science, Commerce, IST, BBA), PG Sem II, BA BEd Sem IV and BEd Sem IV.

sections.heading: Steps to Check GM University Result 2026

content.text: Use the steps below to check and download your GM University Result 2026 from the official website:

items: Go to the official GM University website https://www.gmuniversity.ac.in.
Click on the Notice/Result section, or directly open https://www.gmuniversity.ac.in/notice.php.

On the notice page, locate the relevant result notice such as: MCA-SEM-II-AUG-2025 MBA-SEM-II-AUG-2025 / MBA-FM-SEM-II-AUG-2025 UG-BBA-SEM-IV-AUG-2025 UG-ART/SCIENCE/COMMERCE/IST-SEM-IV-AUG-2025 PG-SEM-II-AUG-2025 BA. BED-SEM-IV-AUG-2025 BED-SEM-IV-AUG-2025
MCA-SEM-II-AUG-2025
MBA-SEM-II-AUG-2025 / MBA-FM-SEM-II-AUG-2025
UG-BBA-SEM-IV-AUG-2025
UG-ART/SCIENCE/COMMERCE/IST-SEM-IV-AUG-2025
PG-SEM-II-AUG-2025
BA. BED-SEM-IV-AUG-2025
BED-SEM-IV-AUG-2025
Click on the View Result or PDF link given in the notice.
If the result is PDF based, search your Roll Number/Registration Number in the file using Ctrl+F.
If redirected to an online result page, select your course and semester, enter your roll/registration number and submit to view the result.
Download or print the provisional marksheet for your academic records and future processes like revaluation or admission to the next semester.
